_comment: Copy to notify_config.json (gitignored) to enable off-screen alerts. You can instead set env vars TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN / TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID / ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL, which override this file.
_telegram_setup: 1) In Telegram, message @BotFather -> /newbot -> copy the token. 2) message @userinfobot (or your new bot, then open https://api.telegram.org/bot<token>/getUpdates) to get your numeric chat id. Paste both below.
_webhook: Optional. Any URL that accepts a POST of {"text": "..."} (Slack/Discord-style incoming webhook, your own endpoint, etc.). Used in addition to Telegram if both are set.
_tuning: enabled turns all server-side alerts on/off. min_rating is the idea-alert conviction floor: High (>=66), Medium (>=40), or All. vol_mult is the unusual-volume spike threshold (x average) for a rising stock.
